# Startup Security Guide & LLM CISO Persona

> Startup security guide, compliance checklist, and LLM-based virtual CISO persona. Dual-language (KR / EN) with specialized cross-jurisdiction compliance modules for GDPR, CCPA, and Korean PIPA.

## English Documents (Korea Market Entry Positioning)

- [README_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/README_EN.md): Project overview. Problem awareness (Tving, CU, FastCampus incidents). Core hypothesis: LLM as first CISO for startups. Positioned for foreign startups entering Korea. Similar projects evaluation (Awesome LLM CISO). Tech stack overview.
- [STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_EN.md): Full security guide with GDPR vs. CCPA vs. PIPA jurisdiction comparison matrix. Stage-gated checklist (29 items). Cloud security (AWS/GCP/Azure/Vercel). Google Workspace security. DRM & document security. KISA compliance gap analysis. Incident response with Korea deadlines.
- [LLM_CISO_PROMPT_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_PROMPT_EN.md): Virtual CISO persona with cross-jurisdiction compliance modules. 25-dimension gap analysis prompt. Domain assessment prompts (cloud, workspace, DRM, GDPR, quick scan). Ollama Modelfile for local CISO. Public LLM integration code (Claude/GPT/DeepSeek). TypeScript/Node.js API snippets. Usage scenarios for US/EU startups entering Korea.
- [LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD_EN.md): Dashboard design (Phase 3). Cross-jurisdiction compliance map UI. Component tree. API specifications. 8-week development roadmap.

## Korean Documents (한국어)

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/README.md): 프로젝트 개요. 문제의식 (티빙, CU, 패스트캠퍼스 사례). LLM CISO 가설. Awesome LLM CISO 유사 프로젝트 평가.
- [STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_KR.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_KR.md): 스타트업 정보보호 체계 구축 가이드. 29개 단계별 체크리스트. 클라우드/GWS/DRM/KISA 법규/사고대응.
- [LLM_CISO_PROMPT_KR.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_PROMPT_KR.md): 한국어 CISO 페르소나 및 프롬프트 시스템. Ollama Modelfile. TS/Node.js 통합 코드.
- [LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD.md): 대시보드 기획 (Phase 3). Next.js + Vercel 아키텍처.

## Key Topics

- Cross-Jurisdiction Compliance: GDPR vs. CCPA vs. PIPA gap detection via LLM prompts
- Cloud Security: AWS / GCP / Azure / Vercel (IAM, Encryption, CSPM, CI/CD)
- Google Workspace Security: Gmail / Drive / Docs / Admin Console (2FA, DLP, IRM)
- DRM & Document Security: Classification, IRM, Source Code Protection, Offboarding
- KISA Compliance: PIPA Article 29 (6 mandatory measures), encryption standards, access logs
- Incident Response: NIST SP 800-61 with Korea-specific reporting deadlines

## Tech Stack

- TypeScript (Strict) + Node.js 22 + Vercel
- Next.js 15 (Dashboard, Phase 3)
- Public LLM: Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4o (OpenAI), DeepSeek
- Local LLM: Ollama (Llama 3 / Gemma 3 / EXAONE 3.5)
- Auth: NextAuth.js (Google OAuth)
- Notifications: Slack Webhook, Resend (Email), Notion API

## About

- Author: Dennis Kim (김호광), gameworker@gmail.com, https://github.com/gameworkerkim
